title: Realmspire
description: Realmspire is an epic RPG fantasy modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1 inspired from Hytale. Featuring classes, magic, dungeons and a modern combat system, it blends survival with roleplay and invites you to write your own legend.
body:
## Description
**Realmspire** is a fantasy RPG modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1 that immerses you in a world full of danger, magic, and adventure. With hundreds of mods, classic survival merges with deep roleplay potential and thrilling combat.  

### Features
- **RPG Classes & Progression** – Become a Berserker, Mage, Paladin, Rogue, or Archer and grow your skills with levels and talent trees.  
- **Magic & Relics** – Master spells, runes, and powerful artifacts to shape your destiny.  
- **Adventure & Exploration** – Conquer massive dungeons, reworked strongholds, mineshafts, and fortresses filled with new challenges.  
- **Immersive World** – Seasons, particle effects, atmospheric sounds, realistic animations, and shader support breathe life into the realm.  
- **Modern Combat** – Enhanced battles with *Better Combat*, dodge rolls, new weapons, and unique armor sets.  
- **Performance Optimized** – Powered by Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore & ModernFix for smooth gameplay even in epic fights.  

**Your legend begins here.**  
Forge your own path in Realmspire – as a shining hero, mighty spellcaster, or dark warrior of the night.  

---

Roadmap:

- Quests
